title: Change column titles with GraphQL?
excerpt:
Hey guys, 
Trying to make a view that helps the user visualize what they need when creating the board. A great feature to have would be the ability to mutate the column titles. (ie. Status, Date, Person). 
Thanks a lot

posts.author: isaac.dunnett (Isaac Dunnett)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey guys,

Trying to make a view that helps the user visualize what they need when creating the board. A great feature to have would be the ability to mutate the column titles. (ie. Status, Date, Person).

Thanks a lot

posts.author: Scott-monday.com (Scott Underwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @isaac.dunnett

First of all, a big warm welcome to the monday.com community! We’re stoked to have you

I can certainly see the value in being able to update column titles via the API! I’ve passed this along to our team as feedback for review and consideration as we continue to make improvements to the API

If you have any other suggestions, keep em coming!

-Scott

posts.author: Yoav_Amir (Yoav Amir)
posts.cookedHtml:
Scott-monday.com:

I can certainly see the value in being able to update column titles via the API! I’ve passed this along to our team as feedback for review and consideration as we continue to make improvements to the API

Hi @isaac.dunnett, Yoav here from Monday.com. Wanted to update that the we’ve released this new mutation, you can find all the details here - https://monday.com/developers/v2#mutations-section-columns-change-column-title
